description: Multiple stack-based buffer overflows in (a) InterActual Player 2.60.12.0717 and (b) Roxio CinePlayer 3.2 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a (1) long FailURL attribute in the IAMCE ActiveX Control (IAMCE.dll) or a (2) long URLCode attribute in the IAKey ActiveX Control (IAKey.dll).  NOTE: the provenance of this information is unknown; the details are obtained solely from third party information.
